title: New Zealand Individual Tax Return (IR3, 2026 income year)
description: File a New Zealand individual's income tax return using Inland Revenue's IR3 form, for taxpayers whose income is not fully covered by the auto-calculated "my income tax assessment" (e.g. self-employment, rental, overseas, partnership, LTC, or other non-standard income). Covers personal and bank details, income with tax deducted, schedular payments, interest, dividends, Māori authority distributions, estate/trust income, overseas income, partnership and look-through company (LTC) income, shareholder-employee salary, residential property income, other rents, self-employment, property sales, government subsidies, other income, expense claims, tax credit and income subtotals, net losses brought forward, taxable income, the Independent Earner Tax Credit, excess imputation credits, Portfolio Investment Entity (PIE) income, the tax calculation result, provisional tax, foreign-entity and part-year disclosures, and the notice-of-assessment declaration. Out of scope: transferring a refund to a different taxpayer's income tax account or student loan (Boxes 38C-38H), which the source form models as a repeating third-party name/IRD-number/amount structure the current flat field model (GSP-0009) cannot express; and the PIE and tax-calculation worksheets in the companion IR3G guide, whose own line-by-line arithmetic is not modelled — only the worksheets' final transferred totals are captured as fields. This document models the 2026 income year (1 April 2025 to 31 March 2026); Inland Revenue reissues a fresh IR3 each income year, but no edition scheme in the current closed `edition.scheme` vocabulary (spec v0.3 SS5.7: us-tax-year / gb-tax-year / award-year) fits New Zealand's April-to-March tax year, so this document is published at the plain (non-edition) registry path pending a spec proposal — see VERIFICATION.md and spec/proposals/0019-generalize-edition-scheme-calendar-tax-year.md. It does not submit the return; the live Inland Revenue myIR service and the live IR3 source are always authoritative.

source.documentRef: IR3 2026 (Individual tax return, 1 April 2025 to 31 March 2026) plus its companion 'IR3G 2026 Individual income tax return guide'

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the official Inland Revenue 'IR3 2026' fillable PDF and its companion 'IR3G 2026' guide PDF, both fetched directly from ird.govt.nz (no access block) and extracted with pdfjs-dist (text content items grouped into lines by y-coordinate; AcroForm annotations enumerated separately for field-type context only). Every field is traced to the numbered Question and lettered Box the printed form itself uses (e.g. Question 22, Box 22H) rather than to the PDF's internal AcroForm field names: those internal names were found to run one number ahead of the printed question numbers from Question 23 onward (e.g. the AcroForm field named '28' sits at the same page position as printed Question 27's box), evidently retained from an earlier form revision that had one fewer numbered question. Using the printed, human-visible numbering (as a filer or agent would actually see it) avoids propagating that internal renumbering quirk into the schema.

fields.name: irdNumber
fields.label: IRD number
fields.description: Your IRD (Inland Revenue Department) number. 8-digit numbers are entered starting from the second box of the printed form's 9-box grid; recorded here as plain digits.

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: Your title, if your correct name is not preprinted on the return.

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: First name(s)
fields.description: Your first name(s), if your correct name is not preprinted on the return.

fields.name: surname
fields.label: Surname
fields.description: Your surname, if your correct name is not preprinted on the return.

fields.name: postalAddressLine
fields.label: Postal address (street address or PO Box)
fields.description: Your correct postal address, if not preprinted on the return. Do not print a tax preparer's address here.

fields.name: postalSuburbOrTownCity
fields.label: Postal suburb/town or city
fields.description: Suburb, box lobby or RD, and town or city for your postal address.

fields.name: residentialStreetAddress
fields.label: Residential street address
fields.description: Your correct street address, if not preprinted on the return and different from your postal address.

fields.name: residentialSuburbCityOrRegion
fields.label: Residential suburb, city, RD or region
fields.description: Suburb, city, RD or region for your residential street address.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Your date of birth, if not preprinted on the return.

fields.name: bicCode
fields.label: Business industry classification (BIC) code
fields.description: Your business industry classification code, if not preprinted on the return or if it has changed. The guide directs filers to businessdescription.co.nz to look up the code; provide the code only, not a description.
fields.sourceRef: IR3 2026 front page, Box 6; IR3G 2026 guide, Question 6

fields.name: phonePrefix
fields.label: Daytime phone area code
fields.description: The area code/prefix of your correct daytime phone number, if not preprinted on the return.

fields.name: phoneNumber
fields.label: Daytime phone number
fields.description: Your correct daytime phone number, if not preprinted on the return.

fields.name: bankNumber
fields.label: Bank number
fields.description: The 2-digit bank number of the New Zealand bank account you want a refund paid into.

fields.name: bankBranch
fields.label: Bank branch
fields.description: The 4-digit branch number of the bank account.

fields.name: bankAccountNumber
fields.label: Bank account number
fields.description: The account number (up to 7 digits) of the bank account.

fields.name: bankAccountSuffix
fields.label: Bank account suffix
fields.description: The 2-3 digit suffix of the bank account.

fields.name: adjustingIncomeForStudentLoanOrWorkingForFamilies
fields.label: Adjusting your income for student loan or Working for Families
fields.description: Tick if you have adjustments to make to your income for student loan or Working for Families purposes that you have not already told Inland Revenue about; if so you must also complete and send in an Adjust your income - IR215 form.

fields.name: hasIncomeWithTaxDeducted
fields.label: Did you receive income with tax deducted, as shown on your Summary of Income?
fields.description: Gate for Question 11. If yes, copy the amounts from your IRD-issued Summary of Income to Boxes 11A-11E.

fields.name: totalPayeDeducted
fields.label: Total PAYE deducted
fields.description: Total PAYE deducted, from your Summary of Income. In NZD.

fields.name: totalGrossIncomeFromSummaryOfIncome
fields.label: Total gross income
fields.description: Total gross income, from your Summary of Income. In NZD.

fields.name: totalIncomeNotLiableForAccEarnersLevy
fields.label: Total income not liable for ACC earners' levy
fields.description: Total income not liable for ACC earners' levy (e.g. NZ Super, income-tested benefits, student allowances). In NZD.

fields.name: accEarnersLevy
fields.label: ACC earners' levy
fields.description: ACC earners' levy, from your Summary of Income. In NZD.

fields.name: totalTaxDeductedFromPayeIncome
fields.label: Total tax deducted
fields.description: Total tax deducted on the income declared at Question 11. In NZD.

fields.name: hasSchedularPayments
fields.label: Did you receive income from schedular payments, as shown on your Summary of Income?
fields.description: Gate for Question 12.

fields.name: schedularPaymentsTaxDeducted
fields.label: Total tax deducted (schedular payments)
fields.description: Total tax deducted from schedular payments, from your Summary of Income. In NZD.

fields.name: schedularPaymentsGross
fields.label: Total gross payments (schedular payments)
fields.description: Total gross schedular payments, from your Summary of Income. In NZD.

fields.name: schedularPaymentsExpenses
fields.label: Expenses related to schedular payments
fields.description: Expenses related to schedular payments. Do not include these expenses again at Box 29. In NZD.

fields.name: schedularPaymentsNet
fields.label: Net schedular payments
fields.description: Net schedular payments: subtract Box 12C from Box 12B. In NZD.

fields.name: hasNzInterest
fields.label: Did you have any New Zealand interest paid or credited to you?
fields.description: Includes interest from partnerships, look-through companies and/or trusts. Keep your interest statements or certificates. Gate for Question 13.

fields.name: totalRwtOnInterest
fields.label: Total RWT
fields.description: Total Resident Withholding Tax (RWT) deducted from your New Zealand interest. In NZD.

fields.name: totalGrossInterest
fields.label: Total gross interest
fields.description: Total gross New Zealand interest. In NZD.

fields.name: interestFromPartnershipLtcOrTrust
fields.label: Interest received from a partnership, LTC, trust or estate
fields.description: Tick if any of the interest declared was received from a partnership, look-through company, trust and/or estate.

fields.name: hasNzDividends
fields.label: Did you have any New Zealand dividends paid or credited to you, or receive shares instead of dividends?
fields.description: Includes dividends from partnerships, look-through companies and/or trusts. Keep your dividend statements. Gate for Question 14.

fields.name: totalDividendImputationCredits
fields.label: Total dividend imputation credits
fields.description: Total imputation credits attached to the dividends declared. In NZD.

fields.name: totalDividendRwtCredits
fields.label: Total dividend RWT credits
fields.description: Total Resident Withholding Tax credits attached to the dividends declared. In NZD.

fields.name: totalGrossDividends
fields.label: Total gross dividends
fields.description: Total gross New Zealand dividends. In NZD.

fields.name: dividendsFromPartnershipLtcOrTrust
fields.label: Dividends received from a partnership, LTC, trust or estate
fields.description: Tick if any of the dividends declared were received from a partnership, look-through company, trust and/or estate.

fields.name: hasMaoriAuthorityDistributions
fields.label: Did you receive any taxable Māori authority distributions?
fields.description: Keep your distribution statements. Gate for Question 15.

fields.name: totalMaoriAuthorityCredits
fields.label: Total Māori authority credits
fields.description: Total Māori authority tax credits attached to the distributions declared. In NZD.

fields.name: totalMaoriAuthorityDistributions
fields.label: Total Māori authority distributions
fields.description: Total taxable Māori authority distributions. In NZD.

fields.name: hasEstateOrTrustIncome
fields.label: Did you receive any New Zealand estate or trust income?
fields.description: Excludes interest, dividends and distributions already shown at Questions 13, 14 or 15. Gate for Question 16.

fields.name: totalTaxPaidByTrustees
fields.label: Total tax paid by trustees
fields.description: Total tax paid by the trustees on the estate or trust income declared. In NZD.

fields.name: totalEstateOrTrustIncome
fields.label: Total estate or trust income (excluding Box 16C)
fields.description: Total estate or trust income, excluding any amount at Box 16C. In NZD.

fields.name: totalNonComplyingTrustDistributions
fields.label: Total taxable distributions from non-complying trusts
fields.description: Total taxable distributions received from non-complying trusts. In NZD.

fields.name: hasOverseasIncome
fields.label: Did you receive any overseas income?
fields.description: If yes, complete an Overseas income summary - IR1261 form and attach it to this return. Gate for Question 17.

fields.name: totalOverseasTaxPaid
fields.label: Total overseas tax paid
fields.description: Total tax paid overseas on the income declared. In NZD.

fields.name: totalOverseasIncome
fields.label: Total overseas income
fields.description: Total overseas income. In NZD.

fields.name: overseasIncomeIncludesForeignSuperWithdrawal
fields.label: Overseas income includes a foreign superannuation withdrawal/transfer
fields.description: Tick if your total overseas income includes a withdrawal and/or transfer from a foreign superannuation scheme.

fields.name: hasPartnershipIncome
fields.label: Did you receive any partnership income?
fields.description: Excludes any income/losses already shown at Questions 13, 14, 15, 17, 22, 24 or 26. Gate for Question 18.

fields.name: totalPartnershipTaxCredits
fields.label: Total partnership tax credits
fields.description: Total tax credits attached to the partnership income declared. In NZD.

fields.name: totalActivePartnershipIncome
fields.label: Total active partnership income
fields.description: Total active partnership income. In NZD.

fields.name: hasLtcIncome
fields.label: Did you receive any look-through company (LTC) income?
fields.description: Excludes any income/loss already shown at Questions 13, 14, 15, 17, 22, 24 and 26. Gate for Question 19.

fields.name: totalLtcTaxCredits
fields.label: Total LTC tax credits
fields.description: Total tax credits attached to the LTC income declared. In NZD.

fields.name: totalActiveLtcIncome
fields.label: Total active LTC income
fields.description: Total active LTC income; if this amount is a loss, record it as negative.

fields.name: ltcNonAllowableDeductionsThisYear
fields.label: Non-allowable deductions this year
fields.description: Non-allowable LTC deductions for this year. In NZD.

fields.name: ltcPriorYearsNonAllowableDeductionsClaimed
fields.label: Prior years' non-allowable deductions claimed this year
fields.description: Prior years' non-allowable LTC deductions claimed this year. In NZD.

fields.name: ltcAdjustedIncome
fields.label: Adjusted LTC income
fields.description: Either add Boxes 19B and 19C, or subtract Box 19D from 19B, per the form's instructions. In NZD.

fields.name: hasShareholderEmployeeSalary
fields.label: Did you receive a shareholder-employee salary with no tax deducted?
fields.description: Gate for Question 20.

fields.name: totalShareholderEmployeeSalary
fields.label: Total shareholder-employee salary
fields.description: Total shareholder-employee salary received with no tax deducted. In NZD.

fields.name: noShareholderSalaryButMayInFuture
fields.label: No shareholder-employee salary now, but may receive one in future
fields.description: Tick if you did not receive a shareholder-employee salary this year but may in the future.

fields.name: shareholderAimTaxCredit
fields.label: Shareholder AIM tax credit
fields.description: Shareholder tax credit arising under the Accounting Income Method (AIM). In NZD.

fields.name: wffMajorShareholderWorkingWithoutPay
fields.label: Major shareholder working full-time without pay for a close company (WfF)
fields.description: Tick if, for Working for Families purposes, you are a major shareholder working full-time without pay for your close company, which earns gross income.

fields.name: taxCreditSubtotal
fields.label: Tax credit subtotal
fields.description: Add Boxes 11E, 12A, 13A, 14A, 15A, 16A, 18A, 19A and 20B. Self-assessed subtotal, in NZD.

fields.name: incomeSubtotal
fields.label: Income subtotal
fields.description: Add Boxes 11B, 12D, 13B, 14B, 15B, 16B, 16C, 17B, 18B, 19E and 20. Self-assessed subtotal, in NZD.

fields.name: hasResidentialPropertyIncomeOrExpenses
fields.label: Did you receive any income or incur any expenses from residential property?
fields.description: Gate for Question 22.

fields.name: residentialIncomeCalculationMethod
fields.label: Residential income calculation method
fields.description: Which method you are using to calculate residential income: Portfolio, Individual, or Combination.

fields.name: grossResidentialRentalIncome
fields.label: Gross residential rental income
fields.description: Gross residential rental income. In NZD.

fields.name: netBrightLineProfit
fields.label: Net bright-line profit (excluding losses)
fields.description: Net bright-line profit, excluding losses. In NZD.

fields.name: otherResidentialIncome
fields.label: Other residential income
fields.description: Other residential income not shown at Boxes 22A/22B. In NZD.

fields.name: totalCombinedResidentialIncome
fields.label: Total combined residential income
fields.description: Add Boxes 22A, 22B and 22C. In NZD.

fields.name: residentialRentalDeductions
fields.label: Residential rental deductions
fields.description: Residential rental deductions for the year. In NZD.

fields.name: excessResidentialRentalDeductionsBroughtForward
fields.label: Excess residential rental deductions brought forward
fields.description: Excess residential rental deductions brought forward from a prior year. In NZD.

fields.name: residentialRentalDeductionsClaimedThisYear
fields.label: Residential rental deductions claimed this year
fields.description: Residential rental deductions claimed this year. In NZD.

fields.name: netResidentialIncome
fields.label: Net residential income
fields.description: Net residential income; if a loss, record it as negative.

fields.name: excessResidentialRentalDeductionsCarriedForward
fields.label: Excess residential rental deductions carried forward
fields.description: Excess residential rental deductions carried forward to next year. In NZD.

fields.name: hasOtherRents
fields.label: Did you receive any other rents?
fields.description: Do not include any income already shown at Question 22. Gate for Question 23.

fields.name: netRents
fields.label: Net rents
fields.description: Net rents not already shown at Question 22. In NZD.

fields.name: hasSelfEmploymentIncome
fields.label: Did you receive income from self-employment?
fields.description: Do not include any income from your Summary of Income here. Gate for Question 24.

fields.name: selfEmployedNetIncome
fields.label: Self-employed net income
fields.description: Self-employed net income. In NZD.

fields.name: hasTaxablePropertySale
fields.label: Did you receive any income from taxable property sales/disposals not already included elsewhere?
fields.description: Excludes any bright-line loss. Gate for Question 25.

fields.name: profitOrLossFromPropertySale
fields.label: Profit/loss from sale of property
fields.description: Profit or loss from the property sale; if a loss, record it as negative.

fields.name: rlwtCredit
fields.label: Residential land withholding tax (RLWT) credit
fields.description: RLWT credit relating to the sale. In NZD.

fields.name: hasGovernmentSubsidy
fields.label: Did you receive any government subsidy?
fields.description: Do not include subsidy amounts already included in gross earnings or schedular payments elsewhere on the return. Gate for Question 26.

fields.name: totalGovernmentSubsidies
fields.label: Total government subsidies
fields.description: Total government subsidies received. In NZD.

fields.name: hasOtherIncome
fields.label: Did you receive any other income?
fields.description: Gate for Question 27.

fields.name: totalOtherNetIncome
fields.label: Total other net income
fields.description: Total other net income not shown elsewhere on the return. In NZD.

fields.name: otherIncomePayerName
fields.label: Name of payer (other income)
fields.description: Name of the payer of the other income declared at Box 27.

fields.name: otherIncomeType
fields.label: Type of income (other income)
fields.description: Type of the other income declared at Box 27.

fields.name: totalIncome
fields.label: Total income
fields.description: Add Boxes 21B, 22H, 23, 24, 25B, 26 and 27. Self-assessed total, in NZD.

fields.name: claimingOtherExpenses
fields.label: Are you claiming other expenses against your income?
fields.description: Do not show expenses here if you've already claimed them elsewhere on this return. Gate for Question 29.

fields.name: totalOtherExpensesClaimed
fields.label: Total other expenses claimed
fields.description: Total other expenses claimed against income. In NZD.

fields.name: taxPreparerFirstNames
fields.label: Tax preparer's first name(s)
fields.description: First name(s) of the person you paid to complete your return, if any.

fields.name: taxPreparerSurname
fields.label: Tax preparer's surname
fields.description: Surname of the person you paid to complete your return, if any.

fields.name: incomeAfterExpenses
fields.label: Income after expenses
fields.description: Subtract Box 29 from Box 28. Self-assessed, in NZD. Used to work out tax credits.

fields.name: claimingNetLossesBroughtForward
fields.label: Are you claiming net losses brought forward?
fields.description: Gate for Question 31.

fields.name: netLossAmountBroughtForward
fields.label: Net loss amount brought forward
fields.description: Net loss amount brought forward from a prior year. In NZD.

fields.name: netLossAmountClaimedThisYear
fields.label: Net loss amount claimed this year
fields.description: Net loss amount claimed this year. In NZD.

fields.name: taxableIncome
fields.label: Taxable income
fields.description: Subtract Box 31B from Box 30. Self-assessed, in NZD.

fields.name: ietcEligible
fields.label: Eligible for the Independent Earner Tax Credit (IETC)
fields.description: Applicable if your income at Box 30 is between $24,000 and $48,000; you must tick 'Yes' to have the IETC included in your assessment.

fields.name: excludedOverseasIncomeStartDate
fields.label: Excluded overseas income period start date
fields.description: Start date of the period you received excluded overseas income, if any, relevant to your IETC qualifying months.

fields.name: excludedOverseasIncomeEndDate
fields.label: Excluded overseas income period end date
fields.description: End date of the period you received excluded overseas income, if any.

fields.name: ietcQualifyingMonths
fields.label: IETC qualifying months
fields.description: Number of qualifying months for the IETC.

fields.name: ietcTaxCreditAmount
fields.label: IETC tax credit amount
fields.description: Your calculated Independent Earner Tax Credit. In NZD.

fields.name: hasExcessImputationCreditsBroughtForward
fields.label: Do you have excess imputation credits brought forward?
fields.description: Gate for Question 34.

fields.name: excessImputationCreditsBroughtForwardAmount
fields.label: Excess imputation credits brought forward
fields.description: Total excess imputation credits brought forward from a prior year. In NZD.

fields.name: hasPieIncome
fields.label: Did you receive any Portfolio Investment Entity (PIE) income?
fields.description: Gate for Question 35.

fields.name: totalPieIncomeOrLoss
fields.label: Total PIE income/loss
fields.description: Total Portfolio Investment Entity income or loss. In NZD.

fields.name: totalPieDeductions
fields.label: Total PIE deductions
fields.description: Total Portfolio Investment Entity deductions. In NZD.

fields.name: pieCalculationOutcome
fields.label: PIE calculation outcome
fields.description: Outcome of the PIE worksheet in the IR3 guide (Box 5 of that worksheet); the worksheet's own line-by-line calculation is out of scope of this document. In NZD.

fields.name: taxOnTaxableIncome
fields.label: Tax on taxable income
fields.description: Transferred from Box 2 of the tax calculation worksheet in the IR3 guide; the worksheet's own calculation is out of scope of this document. In NZD.

fields.name: residualIncomeTax
fields.label: Residual income tax
fields.description: Transferred from Box 14 of the tax calculation worksheet in the IR3 guide. In NZD.

fields.name: residualIncomeTaxType
fields.label: Residual income tax credit or debit
fields.description: Whether the residual income tax amount is a credit or a debit.

fields.name: taxCalculationResult
fields.label: Tax calculation result
fields.description: Transferred from Box 16 of the tax calculation worksheet in the IR3 guide. In NZD.

fields.name: taxCalculationResultType
fields.label: Tax calculation result credit or debit
fields.description: Whether the tax calculation result is a credit (refund) or a debit (tax to pay).

fields.name: claimingEarlyPaymentDiscount
fields.label: Are you entitled to claim an early payment discount?
fields.description: Applies to certain new provisional taxpayers; see the guide for eligibility.

fields.name: refundAmount
fields.label: Refund amount
fields.description: Copied from Box 36B when the tax calculation result is a credit, i.e. a refund is due. In NZD.

fields.name: transferRefundToNextProvisionalTax
fields.label: Amount transferred to next year's provisional tax
fields.description: Amount of the refund you want transferred to 2027 provisional tax.

fields.name: transferRefundToThisYearsStudentLoan
fields.label: Amount transferred to this year's student loan
fields.description: Amount of the refund you want transferred to this year's student loan.

fields.name: remainingRefundAmount
fields.label: Remaining refund amount
fields.description: Subtract Boxes 38A, 38B, 38E and 38H from Box 38: the balance of the refund paid to you directly. Transfers to a different taxpayer's income tax account or student loan (Boxes 38C-38H) are out of scope of this document (GSP-0009: repeating third-party-detail structure). In NZD.

fields.name: residualIncomeTaxExceeds5000Debit
fields.label: Is the amount in Box 36A a debit of more than $5,000?
fields.description: If yes, you may have to pay 2027 provisional tax. Gate for Question 39.

fields.name: provisionalTaxOption
fields.label: 2027 provisional tax option
fields.description: The provisional tax payment option used: S (standard option), E (estimation option), or R (ratio option, available only if GST-registered and approved to use it).
fields.sourceRef: IR3 2026, Box 39A; IR3G 2026 guide, provisional tax section

fields.name: provisionalTax2027PaymentAmount
fields.label: 2027 provisional tax payment
fields.description: Your 2027 provisional tax payment. In NZD.

fields.name: heldForeignRightsRequiringDisclosure
fields.label: Held rights in a foreign company, unit trust, superannuation scheme or life insurance policy requiring disclosure
fields.description: Whether, at any time during the income year, you held rights in a foreign company, unit trust, superannuation scheme or life insurance policy for which disclosure is required.

fields.name: isPartYearReturn
fields.label: Is this return for a part-year?
fields.description: Gate for Question 41.

fields.name: partYearReason
fields.label: Part-year situation
fields.description: Which part-year situation applies to you.

fields.name: partYearStartDate
fields.label: Part-year return start date
fields.description: Start date of the period this return is for.

fields.name: partYearEndDate
fields.label: Part-year return end date
fields.description: End date of the period this return is for.

fields.name: declarationSigned
fields.label: Declaration signed
fields.description: You must read the declaration and sign the return as being true and correct.

fields.name: signatureDate
fields.label: Date of signature
fields.description: The date you signed the declaration.

documents.label: Notice of assessment and declaration
documents.statement: The information in this return is true and correct and represents my assessment for the year ended 31 March 2026 as required under the Tax Administration Act 1994. It is also a correct statement of my earnings for the purposes of the Accident Compensation Act 2001.

steps.title: Income with tax deducted and schedular payments (Questions 11-12)
Interest, dividends, Māori authority distributions, and estate/trust income (Questions 13-16)
Overseas, partnership, LTC and shareholder-employee income (Questions 17-20)
Other rents, self-employment, property sales, subsidies, other income, expenses, and totals (Questions 23-30)
Losses brought forward, taxable income, IETC, imputation credits, and PIE income (Questions 31-35)
Tax calculation, early payment discount, and refunds (Questions 36-38)
2027 provisional tax, disclosures, part-year return, and declaration (Questions 39-42)
